exclude_from_training.reason: Superseded by youtube_1oNOWqOeE64-human-final-trusted.json after the corrected final pass.

serve: Treat serve as a transition, not a single visual pose.
Best serve evidence is: players reset/aligned, most bodies relatively still, server starts motion, receiver/reacting player starts moving immediately after.
A person standing with a paddle is not enough; require reset-to-rally context.
If the camera is blocked at the exact contact, infer only from surrounding reset and immediate rally, otherwise omit.
Audio can support a candidate when a paddle/ball hit appears near the reset-to-rally transition, but audio alone must not create a serve.
end: Final is often easier than serve: players stop chasing, posture relaxes, they walk back or align again.
If the rally continues after a candidate final, reject the final.
paddle_highlight: Raised paddle/highlight requires a deliberate signal held around 2 seconds.
A player or body blocking the camera is not a highlight.
Normal horizontal paddle during play is not enough unless held deliberately as a signal.
camera_framing: Higher camera angle can reduce blocks, but must not lose seated people or the court context.
The model should tolerate occasional blocks by using before/after context.

strict_rules: Do not label a serve from motion alone.
A serve candidate requires a reset posture: players relatively still, server separated enough to initiate, then the rally starts immediately after.
Do not mark the same rally with multiple serve starts unless the previous point has a confirmed end.
Do not label a final from motion alone.
A final candidate requires the rally to visibly stop: players stop chasing/running, paddle collision/acknowledgement, ball dead, or clear reset before the next serve.
A hit is not a point boundary; it is only an internal action marker.
Local-motion scenes are hints only. They must not become final serve/end pairs unless supported by a serve-to-end pattern.
If uncertain, omit the mark instead of inventing it. It is faster for the human to add a missing mark than delete many false marks.
Paddle highlight is valid only when the paddle is deliberately held/signaled for about 2 seconds, not when normal play or body obstruction hides the camera.
Any annotation after 08:00 in youtube_1oNOWqOeE64-human-final.json must be ignored.

motion_threshold_note: Modo aprendido: usa ejemplos humanos para buscar reposo antes del saque y arranque de rally despues. Si hay duda, omitir antes que inventar.
